summary: SINGLE_FOCUS Amazon-seller problem with 3 sellers: A (10/0), B (48/2), C (186/14). Three Beta-distribution posteriors assuming Uniform=Beta(1,1) prior: Beta(11,1) BLUE, Beta(49,3) GREEN, Beta(187,15) ORANGE drawn via Axes.plot using gammaln-based pdf. DashedLine at E[p]=(s+1)/(s+f+2) for each seller with color-matched label. Ranking panel on the left sorts by posterior mean. YELLOW note calls out Laplace's rule of succession — sample size matters even when observed rate is 100%.
